umbrella_groups.title: Canonical paper execution vertical and provider promotion
exit_criteria: Jupiter Swap V2 /build credentialed conformance is current and pinned
MarginFi deployed binary, IDL, account layouts and instruction metas are attested
paper runtime composes planner, compiler, exact simulation, fee/rent sizing and reconciliation
ATA, wSOL, Token-2022 and lookup-table lifecycle evidence is exact
no sender is imported by the paper vertical

umbrella_groups.title: Permit-bound submission, Jito safety and finalized settlement
exit_criteria: single-message Jito tip policy is enforced at the permit boundary
bundle or transaction acknowledgement is never treated as settlement
ambiguous landing is durably reconciled without duplicate submission
finalized transaction and account deltas prove repayment and net economics
live remains impossible until operator and canary gates are satisfied

umbrella_groups.title: Rooted data plane, bounded providers and durable backpressure
exit_criteria: provider bodies, redirects, compression, JSON depth and retries are bounded
quotes carry provider expiry, slot, block height and request/response identity
RPC quorum, webhook dedup, reconnect gaps and queue overload fail closed
silent exception suppression is removed from risk-critical active paths
replay and chaos tests cover partial provider and RPC failures

umbrella_groups.title: Release evidence, key isolation and production operations
exit_criteria: signer keys are isolated behind a narrow capability boundary
container seccomp, non-root, read-only filesystem and secret mounting are real
SBOM, dependency hashes, image digest and provenance are reproducible and reviewed
real shadow soak and drift probes produce immutable evidence
release promotion requires explicit operator acknowledgement and rollback rehearsal
